name: cc-safety-net
desc: A coding agent CLI hook that acts as a safety net, catching destructive git and filesystem commands before they execute. Supports Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode,…
descFull: A coding agent CLI hook that acts as a safety net, catching destructive git and filesystem commands before they execute. Supports Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI, Kimi Code and Pi.
